adr_entry:
No ADR required.

Rationale: US-012 adds tier filtering through a pure domain function `filterByTier` in `src/domain/filterCards.ts`, a `TierFilter` UI component in `src/ui/TierFilter/`, and state wiring in `BrowseAllCards.tsx`. All additions follow established conventions — pure domain logic in `src/domain/`, shared UI components in `src/ui/`, CSS Modules for scoped styling per ADR-004, and tier color tokens already defined in `tokens.css`. No new dependencies, architectural patterns, module boundaries, or routing changes are introduced. The filter composition pattern (`filterByText(filterByTier(cardDeck, activeTiers), searchQuery)`) is standard functional chaining within the existing domain layer, consistent with how US-011 and US-013 compose filters. Both existing ADRs (ADR-004 shell layout, ADR-017 hash router) are unaffected. The identified risk about `filterByCategories` being exported but belonging to US-011 is a correctness concern, not an architectural one — the plan correctly treats it as a separate concern.
